cases.label: lossy
cases.description: A global summary erases region-specific retention periods and the legal-hold deletion precondition.

sources.body: For Mercury EU audit exports, retain records for 13 months. Begin deletion only after confirming that no legal hold applies.
For Mercury US audit exports, retain records for 7 years. An active legal hold suspends deletion regardless of age.

calibrationCandidate.body: Retain all Mercury audit exports for 7 years, then delete them automatically.

requiredClaims.pattern: Mercury EU audit exports, retain records for 13 months
Mercury US audit exports, retain records for 7 years
deletion only after confirming that no legal hold applies

cases.label: lossy
cases.description: Faithful prose is paired with an indirect background ref incorrectly declared as a direct participant.

sources.body: Iris ingestion accepts batches of at most 240 records. This operational limit was derived from knowledge/iris-capacity-study.
After a 429 response, Iris clients wait 18 seconds before retrying the batch.

calibrationCandidate.body: Iris accepts batches of at most 240 records, and clients wait 18 seconds before retrying after a 429 response.

cases.label: lossy
cases.description: A scoped prohibition is reversed while the permitted shadow-ledger behavior remains plausible.

sources.body: Canary workers must never write to the primary ledger. They may write validation records to the shadow ledger.

calibrationCandidate.body: Canary workers may write validation records to the primary ledger and the shadow ledger.

requiredClaims.pattern: must never write to the primary ledger
may write validation records to the shadow ledger

forbiddenClaims.pattern: may write validation records to the primary ledger

cases.label: safe
cases.description: Overlapping retry notes compress safely while preserving the attempt cap, delay sequence, and terminal action.

sources.body: Orchid delivery makes at most three attempts. Wait 2 seconds before the second attempt and 11 seconds before the third attempt.
After the third Orchid delivery failure, stop retrying and move the message to the quarantine queue.

calibrationCandidate.body: Orchid delivery makes at most three attempts, waiting 2 seconds before the second and 11 seconds before the third; after the third failure, stop retrying and move the message to the quarantine queue.

requiredClaims.pattern: 2 seconds before the second.{0,40}11 seconds before the third
after the third failure, stop retrying and move the message to the quarantine queue
